name: Microsoft Entra ID - Conditional Access policies (Zero Trust policy register)
description: Inbound connector: ingests Microsoft Entra ID Conditional Access policies into XCOMPLIANCE.ZTPOLICY - the Zero Trust policy register (NIST SP 800-207 Policy Engine view) behind the /zero-trust Automation & Governance pillars. Normalizes each policy to subject x resource x conditions x grant controls (require MFA / compliant device / block) and state (enabled | disabled | report-only). Modes: `file` (an exported policies JSON - a Graph value[] array), `live` (Microsoft Graph /identity/conditionalAccess/policies with a token), or `demo` (a built-in sample). Read-only against Entra. Config: GRAPH_TOKEN (or pass `token`). Idempotent by policy id.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path to an exported Conditional Access policies JSON (a Graph {"value":[...]} object or array). A demo sample is used if omitted and no token is set.

parameters.name: token
parameters.help: Microsoft Graph bearer token (overrides GRAPH_TOKEN) for live /identity/conditionalAccess/policies
